carpet.rule.infinitelyVault.desc: Players can open vaults an unlimited number of times
carpet.rule.comparatorDupeFix.desc: Fix the comparator item duplication glitch
carpet.rule.noEnchantmentLevelLimit.desc: Removes the level limit on enchantments
carpet.rule.removeTooExpensiveLimit.desc: Removes the "Too Expensive" limit on anvils
carpet.rule.copperGolemFix.desc: Copper golems do not turn into statues in the air
Reintroduces the block entity swap functionality
carpet.rule.endPortalFrameCanBeMined.des: The end portal frame can be mined
carpet.rule.bedrockCanBeMined.desc: Bedrock can be mined and drops itself
carpet.rule.blockDyeing.desc: Right-click on blocks with a dye in your hand to recolor them
carpet.rule.rightClickBlockUpdate.desc: Right-click on the block to emit an update(I don't know what good it is)
carpet.rule.bambooBlockCrashFix.desc: Fixed a crash caused by bamboo getting the wrong void_air stage when growing
carpet.rule.pistonBreakingBlockProducesU: Piston breaking a block produces a block update
carpet.rule.entityHighLight.desc: Right-click on the entity with a dye to highlight it
carpet.rule.NSEEUpdateSuppressorThreshol: Adjust the value of the depth required by the NSEE update suppressor, -1 is disabled
Modify the threshold for the chain depth logger to print
carpet.rule.spongeCanBeDriedNaturally.de: The sponge that is placed can be dried naturally
carpet.rule.placeableNetherPortal.desc: Purple glazed terracotta placed by players transforms into a nether portal
Removed the lock in the PalettedContainer class
carpet.rule.removedThreadChecks.desc: Removed thread checks when retrieving block entities
carpet.rule.simpleChunkDupe.desc: This prevents chunk from being saved
carpet.rule.oreBreeding.desc: Ore can be propagated with bone meal
carpet.rule.scaffoldingBlockCanBeRipenin: Scaffolding can be matured by bone meal
carpet.rule.pointedDripstoneBlockCanBeRi: Pointed Dripstone can be matured by bone meal
carpet.rule.repairTheMonsterAI.desc: Fixed an issue where the target was standing inside solid blocks with incorrect pathfinding errors
carpet.rule.bedrockCanBeMined.extra.0: Note: This rule conflicts with the setBedrockHardness rule from the vanilla Carpet mod
carpet.rule.bedrockCanBeMined.extra.1: If you only enable this rule, bedrock will be unbreakable
carpet.rule.bedrockCanBeMined.extra.2: If you only set setBedrockHardness to true, bedrock will not drop as an item
carpet.rule.infinitelyTotem.extra.0: When a totem is used,it is not consumed
carpet.rule.comparatorDupeFix.extra.0: Fix the comparator item duplication glitch
carpet.rule.noEnchantmentLevelLimit.extr: Enchantment level can reach 225 and it is recommended to use the noTooExpensive function
carpet.rule.blockDyeing.extra.0:
Includes the following blocks: wool
wool carpet
candle
terracotta & glazed terracotta
concrete powder & concrete
stained glass & stained glass pane
shulker box
The purple glazed terracotta placed by the player transforms into the nether portal
carpet.rule.simpleChunkDupe.extra.0:
Place a shulker box named "ChunkDupe" inside a chunk
this chunk will throw an exception when saved
